release_notes: Activate Licence ribbon button — paste a licence key emailed by the Site and unlock Pro features without leaving Excel.
changelog: New 'Activate Licence' ribbon button (Pro group) — paste a licence key purchased on the Site and activate Pro features without leaving Excel
POST /api/v1/licence/activate is anonymous and issues a Bearer token; XLL stores the token DPAPI-encrypted in api.token.dat
Stable per-machine SHA-256 fingerprint (MAC + machine name + user) sent during activation so seat tracking works across reboots
Inline error rendering in the Activate dialog: NETWORK_ERROR, LICENCE_INVALID, SEAT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED retry without closing the dialog
